title: Publication of survey
doc_html:
§206. Publication of survey

            The results of the geological surveys shall be published by the Department of Conservation and Energy.

            Acts 1983, No. 705, §2, eff. Sept. 1, 1983; Acts 2023, No. 150, §5, eff. Jan. 10, 2024.
doc_text:
§206.  Publication of survey
The results of the geological surveys shall be published by the Department of
Conservation and Energy.
Acts 1983, No. 705, §2, eff. Sept. 1, 1983; Acts 2023, No. 150, §5, eff. Jan. 10, 2024.
